title: Button Component
content: A flexible and accessible button component for the DocMed UI. This component is built using `class-variance-authority` for managing variants and sizes, and `react-slot` for enabling the `asChild` prop. **Key Exports:** * **`Button`**: The main React component for rendering buttons. * **`buttonVariants`**: A utility function from `class-variance-authority` that generates CSS classes based on variant and size props. **Props:** * `variant` (string): Controls the visual style of the button. Options include `default`, `destructive`, `outline`, `secondary`, `ghost`, `link`. * `size` (string): Controls the size of the button. Options include `default`, `sm`, `lg`, `icon`. * `asChild` (boolean, default: `false`): If `true`, the button will render as a `Slot` component from Radix UI, allowing it to be a direct child of another component and inherit its props. This is useful for composing buttons with other elements like icons. * Standard HTML button attributes are also supported (e.g., `onClick`, `disabled`). **Usage Example:** ```tsx import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button"; function MyComponent() { return ( <> ); } ```
